lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: amrit baanee satigur poore kee jis kirapaal hovai tis ridai vasehaa |
lines.english: The Word of the Perfect True Guru's Bani is Ambrosial Nectar; it dwells in the heart of one who is blessed by the Guru's Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਕਟੀਐ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਹਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa tis kaa katteeai sadaa sadaa sukh hohaa |2|
lines.english: His coming and going in reincarnation is ended; forever and ever, he is at peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਜੰਤੁ ਸੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਬੁਝਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaanaa jant so tudh bujhee |
lines.english: He alone understands You, Lord, with whom You are pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੇਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਗਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no teree nadar haumai tis gee |
lines.english: Egotism is eradicated, when You bestow Your Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਜੰਤੁ ਸੁ ਦਰਗਹ ਸਿਝਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaanaa jant su daragah sijhee |
lines.english: He alone is approved in the Court of the Lord, with whom You are pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਸਚਾ ਸੋ ਥਿਅਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no too kirapaal sachaa so thiaee |
lines.english: One who is blessed with Your Mercy, becomes truthful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਵਲਿ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਸੋ ਭਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis kai suaamee val nirbhau so bhee |
lines.english: One who has the Lord Master on his side, becomes fearless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂ ਸੰਤੁਸਟੁ ਕਲਮਲ ਤਿਸੁ ਖਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no too santusatt kalamal tis khee |
lines.english: Sins are erased, when You are thoroughly pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੇਰੀ ਮਇਆ ਨ ਪੋਹੈ ਅਗਨਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no teree meaa na pohai aganee |
lines.english: One who is blessed with Your Kindness, is not touched by fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਸਦਾ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਮਤਿ ਲਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tis no sadaa deaal jin gur te mat lee |7|
lines.english: You are forever Merciful to those who are receptive to the Guru's Teachings. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਜਪੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਇ ਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa japee teraa naam satigur paae pai |
lines.english: Forever and ever, I chant Your Name; I fall at the feet of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa kirapaal aape bakhas lai |
lines.english: Please grant Your Grace, O Merciful Lord; please forgive me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਏਤੈ ਕੰਮਿ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavaa din rain etai kam laae |
lines.english: May I sing Your Glorious Praises day and night; please commit me to this task.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਥ ਦੇਇ ਆਪਿ ਰਖੁ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਭਉ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: hath dee aap rakh viaapai bhau na koe |
lines.english: Please give me Your hand, and save me, that fear may not afflict me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਸੁ ਦੂਖਾ ਨਾਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan antar vas dookhaa naas hoe |
lines.english: Please, dwell within my mind and body, and end my sufferings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kai sang haumai rog jaae |
lines.english: Associating with the humble Saints, the disease of egotism is eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sarab nirantar khasam eko rav rahiaa |
lines.english: The One Lord and Master is all-pervading, permeating everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਕਰਹੁ ਦਇਆਲ ਅਪਣੀ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਦੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: deaa karahu deaal apanee sifat dehu |
lines.english: Please bless me with Your Kindness, O Kind Lord, and bless me with Your Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਲਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee sach sacho sach lahiaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have truly found the Truest of the True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਨਿਹਾਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਏਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: darasan dekh nihaal naanak preet eh |1|
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, I am in ecstasy; this is what Nanak loves. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਪਿਰਹੜੀ ਦੂਜੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eikas siau kar piraharree doojee naahee jaae |
lines.english: Be in love with the One Lord; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਜਪੀਐ ਮਨੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਇਕਸ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eko japeeai manai maeh ikas kee saranaae |
lines.english: Meditate on the One Lord within your mind, and enter the Sanctuary of the One Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eiko daataa mangeeai sabh kichh palai paae |
lines.english: Beg from the One Lord, the Great Giver, and you will be blessed with everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਇਕੋ ਇਕੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan saas giraas prabh iko ik dhiaae |
lines.english: In your mind and body, with each breath and morsel of food, meditate on the One and only Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਤੇ ਸੰਤ ਜਨ ਜਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee te sant jan jin man vutthaa aae |
lines.english: Very fortunate are those humble Saints, within whose minds the Lord has come to abide.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam nidhaan sach guramukh paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh obtains the true treasure, the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal rav rahiaa doojaa koee naeh |
lines.english: He is pervading and permeating the water, the land and the sky; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਚਰਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਖਸਮ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaaee naam ucharaa naanak khasam rajaae |2|
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, and chanting the Naam, Nanak abides in the Will of his Lord and Master. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂ ਰਖਵਾਲਾ ਮਾਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਉਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis no too rakhavaalaa maare tis kaun |
lines.english: One who has You as his Saving Grace - who can kill him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂ ਰਖਵਾਲਾ ਜਿਤਾ ਤਿਨੈ ਭੈਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis no too rakhavaalaa jitaa tinai bhain |
lines.english: One who has You as his Saving Grace conquers the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਗੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਮੁਖੁ ਉਜਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis no teraa ang tis mukh ujalaa |
lines.english: One who has You on his side - his face is radiant and bright.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਗੁ ਸੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੀ ਹੂੰ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis no teraa ang su niramalee hoon niramalaa |
lines.english: One who has You on his side, is the purest of the Pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੇਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਲੇਖਾ ਪੁਛੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis no teree nadar na lekhaa puchheeai |
lines.english: One who is blessed with Your Grace is not called to give his account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਵਲਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਿਆ ਮੁਹਛੰਦਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis no too prabh val tis kiaa muhachhandagee |
lines.english: One who has You on his side, God - unto whom is he subservient?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੇਰੀ ਖੁਸੀ ਤਿਨਿ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਭੁੰਚੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis no teree khusee tin nau nidh bhuncheeai |
lines.english: One with whom You are pleased, obtains the nine treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੇਰੀ ਮਿਹਰ ਸੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਬੰਦਿਗੀ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jis no teree mihar su teree bandigee |8|
lines.english: One who is blessed with Your Kind Mercy is dedicated to Your worship. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਸੰਤਾਂ ਸੰਗਿ ਵਿਹਾਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: hohu kripaal suaamee mere santaan sang vihaave |
lines.english: Be Merciful, O my Lord and Master, that I may pass my life in the Society of the Saints.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧਹੁ ਭੁਲੇ ਸਿ ਜਮਿ ਜਮਿ ਮਰਦੇ ਤਿਨ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਚੁਕਨਿ ਹਾਵੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tudhahu bhule si jam jam marade tin kade na chukan haave |1|
lines.english: Those who forget You are born only to die and be reincarnated again; their sufferings will never end. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਘਟਿ ਅਵਘਟਿ ਘਟ ਘਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: satigur simarahu aapanaa ghatt avaghatt ghatt ghaatt |
lines.english: Meditate in remembrance within your heart on the True Guru, whether you are on the most difficult path, on the mountain or by the river bank.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੰਤਿਆ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਬੰਧੈ ਵਾਟ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har har naam japantiaa koe na bandhai vaatt |2|
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, no one shall block your way. ||2||
